hero.description: MeritLens is your smart evaluation platform that helps you choose the right person with confidence and ease.

features.section_subtitle: Transform your hiring experience into a smarter, faster, data-driven process

smart_evaluations.title: Smart evaluations tailored to your needs
smart_evaluations.description: Create professional assessments once and apply them across multiple roles with ease. Add video intros, real-world simulations, and AI-powered behavioral analysis — for a clear, comprehensive view of every candidate.

predictive_reporting.title: Predictive Reports — See Beyond the Numbers for Smarter Hiring
predictive_reporting.description: Take your hiring decisions to the next level with our intelligent predictive analytics. Using advanced AI-powered algorithms, MeritLens helps you forecast candidate stability, retention likelihood, and cultural fit — before you hire.

role_based_dashboards.title: Smart Dashboards for Every Role — Seamless Management & Real-Time Collaboration
role_based_dashboards.description: Give your team the tools they need to succeed. Admins, recruiters, and viewers each get tailored dashboards to track performance, manage permissions, and collaborate instantly — all with clarity and zero complexity.
role_based_dashboards.list_item1: Role-based user permissions for full control
role_based_dashboards.list_item2: Live collaboration tools to boost teamwork
role_based_dashboards.list_item3: Detailed logs and compliance tracking for transparency and security

additional_features.title: Legal Neutrality
additional_features.description: Objective, compliant evaluation tools that deliver accurate insights without biasing hiring decisions.

additional_features.title: Multilingual Support
additional_features.description: Run your system globally with Arabic and English interfaces, plus ready-to-use international certificates.

additional_features.title: Lightning-Fast Reporting
additional_features.description: Generate comprehensive candidate reports in minutes — speeding up hiring without sacrificing accuracy.

additional_features.title: Enterprise-Grade Security
additional_features.description: Military-grade encryption, full GDPR compliance, and detailed audit logs for total peace of mind.

additional_features.title: Trusted Certifications
additional_features.description: Issue AI-backed certificates with QR codes for instant verification and high credibility.

additional_features.title: Seamless Team Collaboration
additional_features.description: Advanced collaboration tools for admins, recruiters, and viewers — with role-based permissions for efficient teamwork

how_it_works.section_title: Start Hiring Top Talent with Ease
how_it_works.section_subtitle: Just three simple steps to make the right choice

steps.title: Create Your Account
steps.description: Sign up as a company or an individual it only takes minutes to get started.

steps.title: Add Candidates
steps.description: Upload their data and choose the right evaluation for each role or profile.

steps.title: Get Smart Insights
steps.description: Instant AI-powered reports to help you make confident, data-driven hiring decisions.

pricing.section_title: Flexible, Transparent Pricing for Every Team
pricing.section_subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your goals and elevate your hiring process with ease upgrade anytime.

cta.title: Smart Hiring Starts Here
cta.subtitle: Ready to make smarter hiring decisions? Join thousands of business owners who rely on AI-powered insights to select top talent and build high-performing teams.

footer.mission_statement: MeritLens equips recruitment entities—whether individual employers, licensed agencies, or HR teams—with AI-powered tools to evaluate candidates objectively, uncover hidden strengths, and make confident hiring decisions based on data, not assumptions.
footer.newsletter_description: Subscribe to get the latest insights and updates.
